title: ANC - ANC and Transparency are Off, make a call, ANC is off but active and Transparency is disabled
scenario: ANC becomes active and changeable during a call when both ANC and Transparency are set to OFF, while Transparency is incorrectly greyed out
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode.
4. Ensure both ANC and Transparency Mode are set to OFF (no selected values).
5. Make an outgoing call or receive an incoming call using the Poly device.
6. During the active call, return to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode.
7. Observe the state of ANC and Transparency Mode toggles/options.
expected: ANC should remain OFF and not be changeable by the user during a call. Transparency Mode should be disabled/greyed out and not changeable by the user.
